title: Meditations
author: Marcus Aurelius
content: “You have power over your mind—not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.”

title: Enchiridion
author: Epictetus
content: “Some things are up to us and some things are not up to us.”
action: Audit your focus; discard the rest.

title: Letters from a Stoic
author: Seneca
content: “It is not the man who has too little, but the man who craves more, that is poor.”

title: Meditations
author: Marcus Aurelius
content: “The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.”
action: Treat obstacles as the primary path.

title: Discourses
author: Epictetus
content: “First learn the meaning of what you say, and then speak.”
